niche: astronomy, space missions, celestial objects, discoveries
tone: awe-driven but precise science communicator -- wonder-forward, not sensationalist

voice.engineLicense: GPL-3.0 (engine, shelled-out-to as external process, not statically linked)
voice.voiceLicenseNote: Channel's own research doc flagged specific checkpoint as an Open Gap (Hugging Face rhasspy/piper-voices page returned only JS-shell boilerplate via Firecrawl). en_US-libritts_r-medium used here as the safe default -- independently confirmed commercial-safe (CC-BY) by two other channels' research (see mind-mosaic.json), not a checkpoint pinned by this channel's own research.
voice.note: Per-speaker id not yet auditioned by ear for 'measured, unhurried documentary-narrator register' -- operator should re-audition alternate speaker ids within this multi-speaker model before locking production voice, per this channel's own research doc.

music.note: Copyright Risk Flag in research doc leaves trending-vs-royalty-free as an explicit operator decision -- stem-separating a trending track does not clear the underlying composition's copyright. Defaults to the safe (non-trending) path -- see pipeline music-bed generation for what is actually wired (a synthesized placeholder) vs. still a stub.

sfx.source: @rse/soundfx (CC-0 / CC-BY-3.0), individual soundfx.d/*.mp3 files vendored locally

visualTokens.notes: Background tokens are the PIL-pixel-sampled near-black-navy/pure-black/deep-navy trio from the reference clip's frames (moodboard 'Extracted Color Tokens' section B). calmInsight primary (#49C5B6) is the cross-validated cool teal/cyan secondary accent; lightnessEnergy primary (#DF6C4F) is the burnt-orange accent attested independently on two separate Awwwards sites plus corroborated by the Dribbble rust-family swatches (#993117/#B85434/#5B2011) -- the moodboard's single most cross-validated color finding. tensionBias primary (#6B4A84) is the sampled violet/mauve nebula-wisp tone. captionEmphasis (#FFD700) is the gold/yellow karaoke-caption color pixel-sampled directly from the downloaded reference Short; the moodboard explicitly flags this as caption-chrome rather than a background/accent brand color, which is exactly the role it plays here (KineticCaption emphasisWord only, never a background/card token).

typography.captionStyle: heavy/bold rounded-sans grotesk, solid fill with dark stroke outline for contrast over busy starfield/nebula footage (exact font file unverified from video pixels -- Open Gap in moodboard)
typography.captionRevealUnit: 1-3 word phrases, ~2s cadence (karaoke-style word-by-word observed in reference clip)
typography.emphasisTier: two-tier: default white (#FFFFFF), one gold (#FFD700) emphasized keyword per caption beat

spacing.infographicReveal: staggered/incremental, one element per speech beat, not all-at-once
spacing.brollDensity: single striking image per hold, full-bleed, no lower-third bar or watermark -- moodboard's 'low visual density' finding

pacing.note: Reference clip's average shot hold read visually off an 11-shot/23-frame 2s-interval contact sheet (moodboard Motion/Pacing Notes) as ~6-7s, not a frame-accurate scene-cut detector pass -- treated as an estimate, per moodboard Open Gaps. Adapted shot grammar below maps the observed low-layout-variance/low-to-moderate-motion-intensity beat structure onto text/graphics-only primitives, same adaptation pattern as docs/pilot-mind-mosaic-adaptation.md.

motionPersonality.easingNote: avoid spring-overshoot 'punchy' typography moves -- moodboard explicitly reads this channel's 'precise' half of its tone as undercut by bouncy easing; favor simple fade / easeOut / easeInOut caption-in/out (Motion.dev vocabulary) and slow continuous ambient motion (hue-cycling orb) during holds, matching the reference's straight-hard-cuts-no-shake-no-glitch editing
